CustomField.description: Product qualification control level used by the guided selling process.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Used by guided selling to match products to the customer's platform control needs.
CustomField.label: Platform Control

value.fullName: Basic - core features are enough for now
value.label: Basic - core features are enough for now

value.fullName: Intermediate - need enterprise controls and granular access
value.label: Intermediate - need enterprise controls and granular access

value.fullName: Advanced - need specialized features for sensitive/regulated data
value.label: Advanced - need specialized features for sensitive/regulated data
